title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Bajaj Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance:
Bajaj Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance!
